items.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Bayern, Madrid in race to sign Tottenham's Sarr
items.description: Both Bayern Munich and Real Madrid are competing to sign Tottenham midfielder Pape Matar Sarr. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.headline: PSG suffer huge blow as Lyon victory opens up title race
items.description: Ligue 1 leaders Paris Saint-Germain suffered a shock defeat as Lyon boosted their hopes of playing Champions League football next season with a 2-1 success at Parc des Princes.

items.headline: World Snooker Championship 2026: Results, schedule, how to watch, prize money, winners, more
items.description: Everything you need to know about the 2026 World Snooker Championship as Zhao Xintong, Ronnie O'Sullivan and Co. bid for glory at the Crucible Theatre.

items.headline: Reynolds, Keller lift Pirates to 6-3 win over Rays
items.description: — Bryan Reynolds drove in three runs, Mitch Keller pitched seven strong innings, and the Pittsburgh Pirates defeated the Tampa Bay Rays 6-3 on Sunday.

items.headline: NCAA men's gymnastics championship: All-time winners list
items.description: Stanford took home top honors in the 2026 NCAA men's gymnastics championships. Check out other schools that have won titles now.

items.headline: Ivan Toney backing himself to fire Al Ahli into AFC Champions League Elite final
items.description: Although he's scored just once in the ACL Elite this season, Ivan Toney remains confident he can make the difference in the semis.

items.headline: José Ramírez hits 2 homers, Brayan Rocchio drives in 3 as Guardians beat Orioles 8-4 to win series
items.description: — José Ramírez homered twice, Brayan Rocchio had three hits and three RBI, and the Cleveland Guardians beat the Orioles 8-4 on Sunday to take three of four from Baltimore.

items.headline: Curtis Mead homers, Andrew Alvarez shines in relief as Nationals blank Giants 3-0 to avoid sweep
items.description: — Curtis Mead hit a two-run homer, Andrew Alvarez worked 4 1/3 sharp innings in relief and the Washington Nationals beat the San Francisco Giants 3-0 on Sunday to avoid a three-game sweep.

items.headline: Who has won Copa del Rey? All-time winners list
items.description: Barcelona have the most Copa del Rey titles in history. Learn more about the competition's all-time winners.

items.headline: Who has won Bundesliga? All-time German soccer winners list
items.description: Bayern Munich has won more Bundesliga championships than any other team, with 35 titles. Check out the all-time German soccer winners list now.

items.headline: Aces' Dana Evans out indefinitely with left leg injury
items.description: Guard Dana Evans, who re-signed with the Aces as a free agent last week, will be sidelined indefinitely while recovering from a left leg injury.

items.headline: VAR review: Should Arsenal's Gabriel have been sent off for headbutt?
items.description: Arsenal defender Gabriel got a yellow card following an altercation with Manchester City's Erling Haaland. What happened?

items.headline: Jayson Tatum has strong return to playoffs for Celtics, who rout 76ers 123-91 in Game 1
items.description: — Jayson Tatum had 25 points, 11 rebounds and seven assists in his first playoff game since rupturing his right Achilles tendon last season, and the Boston Celtics rolled past the...

items.headline: Gōtoku Sakai calls for Vissel Kobe to show courage against star-studded Al Ahli
items.description: Vissel Kobe's Gōtoku Sakai has called on his team to show courage against a star-studded Al Ahli outfit.

items.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
items.description: The Eastern and Western Conference playoff brackets are set after Sunday's games. See the full schedule of games.
